assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 11-12 shows 'Matrix file | security-matrix.md' and 'Last-Updated timestamp | 2026-06-28T10:00:00Z', confirming the timestamp was read from security-matrix.md.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 14-16 show 'Age | 9 days', 'Staleness threshold | 14 days', 'Stale? | No (9 < 14)'. Line 3 states 'Result: PASS (Not Stale)'. Line 5 states 'No warning was issued and no user prompt was required.'

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix -- the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 5 states 'No warning was issued and no user prompt was required.' Line 20 reiterates 'no warning is displayed, no user prompt is presented, and triage continues to Step 0.5 without interruption.'

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 29 states 'Proceeding to Step 0.5 (Jira Access Initialization).' The separate data-extraction.md file documents Step 1 (Data Extraction), confirming the triage proceeded well beyond Step 0.5 without interruption.
